_publications._publicationTitle: Systems Biology Approaches Reveal Potential Phenotype-Modifier Genes in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: For gnomAD, we found a total of 11,211 variants. SMARCA4 and EGFR have the highest numbers of variants (2575 and 2000, respectively); SDC2 and PTEN the lower (335 and 456, respectively).
details: Identified total of 11,211 variants across 10 candidate genes, with SMARCA4 and EGFR having highest numbers (2575 and 2000 respectively)
